creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream uses mongodb 3.2 and we were far behind. They do support 3.4, but it looks like 3.6 has problems according to some user reports.

My aim was better upstream compatibility and requests from another port committer to move off the End of Life version of mongodb (2.x) for memory usage reasons and so we could remove the old mongodb from the ports tree.

It is unfortunate that there is no mongodb support for i386 anymore.


https://www.mongodb.com/support-policy


Sadly I will have to reject this bug report. You can't even install the officially supported Debian release of unifi on i386 either at this point.
